title: Badminton's New 3x15 Scoring System for Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system will be implemented across all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in India for junior categories.
summary: Badminton Association of India (BAI) announces the implementation of a 3x15 scoring system for U-13, U-15, and U-17 domestic ranking tournaments and national championships, set to debut at Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes as Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form on the international stage.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open but was unable to secure the title, faltering at the last step against Su Li Yang.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan achieved a notable victory by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler and Cristiano Ronaldo fan, Rounak Chouhan, caused a major upset at the US Open Super 300 by defeating the World No 6 Chou Tien Chen.

title: Thomas Cup Squad Members Reassemble for Asian Games
indian_angle: The core of India's successful Thomas Cup squad, including Treesa-Gayatri, is regrouping to represent the nation at the upcoming Asian Games.
summary: Members of India's Thomas Cup squad are reassembling for the Asian Games, with Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand returning to the lineup, signaling strong preparations for the continental event.

title: Satwik-Chirag Crowned Singapore Open Champions
indian_angle: India's star men's doubles pair, Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty, secured a prestigious BWF Super 750 title at the Singapore Open.
summary: Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty clinched the Singapore Open title after a series of furious rallies and spectacular play, marking another significant achievement for the Indian duo.
